sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import axios from 'axios'; import { Helmet } from 'react-helmet-async'; import toast from 'react-hot-toast'; import { useCart } from '../context/CartContext'; import ProductCard from '../components/ProductCard'; import { unwrapFeaturedResponse, apiMessage } from '../lib/api'; const Home = () => { const [featuredProducts, setFeaturedProducts] = useState([]); const [featuredLoading, setFeaturedLoading] = useState(true); const [featuredError, setFeaturedError] = useState(null); const { addToCart } = useCart(); useEffect(() => { fetchFeaturedProducts(); }, []); const fetchFeaturedProducts = async () => { setFeaturedLoading(true); setFeaturedError(null); try { const response = await axios.get('/api/products/featured'); const list = unwrapFeaturedResponse(response); setFeaturedProducts(list.slice(0, 4)); } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching products:', error); const msg = error.code === 'ERR_NETWORK' || error.message?.includes('Network Error') ? 'Cannot reach the API. Start the backend (port 5000) — from the project folder run npm run dev, or cd backend && npm start.' : apiMessage(error, 'Failed to load products'); setFeaturedError(msg); setFeaturedProducts([]); } finally { setFeaturedLoading(false); } }; const handleAddToCart = async (product) => { await addToCart(product, 1); }; return ( <> Nova Shop — Premium style & living {/* Hero — original split layout (copy + navy visual) */}
✦ New Season Collection

Discover Premium Style & Living

Curated collections of the world's finest products — delivered to your door with next-day shipping.

Shop Now › View Collections
10K+ Products
50K+ Customers
4.9★ Rating
Browse by Category

What Are You Looking For?

📱 Electronics 👗 Fashion 🏡 Home 💄 Beauty ⚽ Sports
Handpicked for You

Featured Products

View All ›
{featuredLoading ? (

Loading featured products…

) : featuredError ? (

Featured products could not be loaded. {featuredError}

) : featuredProducts.length === 0 ? (

No products yet. Restart the backend to auto-seed demos, or run{' '} node scripts/seedDatabase.js in backend, then refresh.

) : (
{featuredProducts.map((product) => ( ))}
)}
Limited Time

Get 20% Off Your First Order

Use the code below at checkout. Valid for new customers only.

NOVA20
Shop the Sale ›
Why Nova Shop

Shopping Made Simple

🚚

Free Delivery

On orders over £50. Next-day available.

🔒

Secure Payments

SSL encrypted. Pay with card, PayPal & more.

↩️

Easy Returns

30-day hassle-free returns policy.

💬

24/7 Support

Live chat, email or phone — always here.

); }; export default Home;
